name: Tom O'Leary
background: Tom O’Leary was appointed Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of Iluka Resources in September 2016. He has previously held senior executive roles at Wesfarmers, including Managing Director of Wesfarmers Chemicals, Energy & Fertilisers. He has a Bachelor of Laws and a Bachelor of Jurisprudence from the University of Western Australia and has completed the Advanced Management Program at Harvard Business School.
